title: Fix publisher stage evidence ordering: gate-results.json not yet written when publisher runs
description: The publisher stage (stage 17) checks for gate-results.json and scenario-catalog.json as evidence prerequisites. However, gate-results.json is written AFTER the stage loop completes (lines 1124-1178 in runner.py), so it does not exist when the publisher stage runs. This causes the publisher to always report 'Publishing blocked: Missing evidence'. The publisher stage should either be moved after gate evaluation, or gate evaluation should be moved into the stage loop.
impact: Publisher always blocked. Does not affect build/runtime/verdict accuracy.
recommendation: Move gate evaluation into the stage loop before publisher, or move publisher after gate evaluation.
